title: Phuket、Phuket — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]

content:
概要

PhuketはPhuketにある人口600,000の都市です。Thailand’s largest island offers stunning beaches, world-class diving, a vibrant expat community, and a tropical lifestyle at a fraction of comparable island destinations.
